name: context-lsp
description: Codex-centered context layer for project planning, ContextPack retrieval, and architecture drift checks.

scripts.verify: npm test && node src/cli.js index --docs docs/planning >/tmp/context-lsp-index.json && node src/cli.js retrieve --docs docs/planning --task "기능 구현 계획 작성" --type plan >/tmp/context-lsp-pack.json && node src/cli.js retrieve --docs docs/planning --root . --task "ContextPack code_refs 확인" --type code --concept ContextPack --target src >/tmp/context-lsp-code-pack.json && node src/cli.js verify --docs docs/planning >/tmp/context-lsp-verify.json && node src/cli.js verify --docs docs/planning --root . --changed src/core/retriever.js >/tmp/context-lsp-drift.json && greenfield=$(mktemp -d /tmp/context-lsp-greenfield.XXXXXX) && node src/cli.js init-project-brain --root "$greenfield" --name "Sample" --idea "Sample product idea" >/tmp/context-lsp-init.json && tmpdir=$(mktemp -d /tmp/context-lsp-reverse.XXXXXX) && cp -R test/fixtures/brownfield/. "$tmpdir" && node src/cli.js reverse-engineer --root "$tmpdir" >/tmp/context-lsp-reverse.json && node src/cli.js guarantees >/tmp/context-lsp-guarantees.json
